title: Max and the Red Ball
description: Max the puppy spends a joyful day with his favorite red ball, finding help from Mom and ending the night cozy and content.

pages.title: Max's Favorite Toy
pages.description: Max the dog shows off his special red ball.

pages.title: Daily Playtime
pages.description: Max loves playing with his ball every day.

pages.title: Bouncing Fun
pages.description: Max runs, jumps, and listens to the bouncy sounds.

pages.title: Ball Under the Chair
pages.description: The ball gets away and Max calls out in surprise.

The ball rolls under the chair.

pages.title: Out of Reach
pages.description: Max tries to grab the ball but it is too far.

pages.title: Mom to the Rescue
pages.description: Mom steps in to help Max get his ball back.

pages.title: Thankful Pup
pages.description: Max thanks Mom and smiles with relief.

pages.title: Sunshine Play
pages.description: Max keeps playing under the bright sun.

pages.title: Sleepy Hugs
pages.description: After a long day, Max grows sleepy and cuddles his ball.

He hugs the ball and sleeps.

pages.title: Good Night, Ball
pages.description: Max says good night to his favorite toy.
